lint.command: No lint script is defined in package.json or .factory/services.yaml for this repo.

blockingIssues.description: `runStartupPrewarm()` still maps every non-2xx injected response to `status: 'timeout'` and still breaks the loop on that status. Real handler or contract failures are therefore mislabeled as budget timeouts and can still prevent later declared targets from running, so startup prewarm does not yet reliably attempt the declared target set or expose accurate diagnostics and metrics evidence.

rejectedObservations.observation: The fix feature appears to have been delivered via an untracked commit rather than a mission feature entry/handoff, which makes scrutiny evidence discovery harder for reruns.
